• Full‑screen canvas game with mobile touch controls, UI overlay, and HUD gauges.
  • Procedural map generation, mining mechanics, upgrades, explosives, and chat.
  • Configurable settings, cloud sync, and a custom modal system for prompts.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy('drill')

This page implements a mining MMO with real‑time multiplayer, inventory, and a shop. It handles graphics, sound, input, and persistent settings while providing modular UI components and a custom modal dialog system.
